title: Raid Counter
description: Shows the names and number of active raiders during raids
body:
**_Raid Counter_** is a lightweight, utility mod designed to give players a tactical edge during Minecraft raids. It adds a real-time overlay to your screen that displays the **number of active raiders** remaining in a raid, along with their **names and types**.
